verdict: APPROVED_BLUEPRINT — Civilization Entry Point replaces Pancake-era home; CORE four (Swap, Workspace, Launch, Map) with constitutional MARCO banner
disclaimer: Homepage blueprint (Mission 21A) — Civilization Entry Point specification only. No UI implementation in this mission.
purpose: Melega DEX homepage as Civilization Entry Point — orient humans and AI agents to constitutional economy, core actions, and honest surface hierarchy in seconds.

constitutional.framing: Canonical Economy — not replaceable by Economic Presence layers

core.label: Swap
core.humanPurpose: Exchange tokens immediately — primary on-chain action.
core.agentPurpose: Route live execution here after registry/orientation.
core.notes: Hero CTA #1. Production-safe. Unchanged execution surface.

core.label: Workspace
core.humanPurpose: Manage your economic activity across indexed Melega surfaces.
core.agentPurpose: Operator hub — aggregate section links without fake balances.
core.notes: Hero CTA #2. Replaces implicit “figure it out” navigation.

core.label: Launch
core.humanPurpose: See what you can create — tokens, pools, collectibles — with honest capability status.
core.agentPurpose: Capability index; links to existing flows only.
core.notes: Hero CTA #3. Must NOT point to /ilo.

core.label: Map
core.humanPurpose: Understand every surface — grouped, status-badged, agent-readable.
core.agentPurpose: Canonical orientation index for humans and agents.
core.notes: Hero CTA #4. Mission 18 surface map becomes homepage compass.

secondary.label: Projects
secondary.humanPurpose: Browse indexed Melega projects and constitutional identity.
secondary.notes: Secondary row — already in global menu.

secondary.label: Assets
secondary.humanPurpose: Canonical and presence asset bindings (MARCO, etc.).
secondary.notes: Pair with Projects in registry strip.

secondary.label: Graph
secondary.humanPurpose: Explore project → asset → venue → event relationships.

secondary.label: Presence
secondary.humanPurpose: Economic presence targets — explicitly NOT Canonical Economy.
secondary.agentPurpose: Distinguish canonical MARCO on BNB from bridge deployments.

advanced.label: Query
advanced.humanPurpose: Structured registry queries for power users.
advanced.agentPurpose: Agent query console — may merge UI with Graph in Mission 22.

advanced.label: Execution
advanced.humanPurpose: Illustrative execution-quality samples — not live trading.
advanced.agentPurpose: Pre-swap decision layer; never execute here.

advanced.label: Identity
advanced.humanPurpose: Economic identity archetypes — not social profile or KYC.

advanced.label: Collectibles
advanced.humanPurpose: Civilization collectibles read model (BabyMarco Genesis, etc.).
advanced.agentPurpose: Collectible class index; mint via legacy /nft when indexed.

advanced.label: Activation
advanced.humanPurpose: Economic Activation Runtime preview — Labs handoff read model.
advanced.agentPurpose: Activation stage index; no chain writes.
advanced.notes: Preview badge. Not primary launch pad.

legacy.label: ILO (Retired)
legacy.humanPurpose: Link compatibility — supersession message and CTAs to Launch/Workspace.
legacy.agentPurpose: Retired surface; manifest declares replacement routes.
legacy.notes: Footer legacy link only. Never hero or carousel.

legacy.label: NFT Mint (Legacy)
legacy.humanPurpose: BabyMarco DNFT mint — BSC on-chain legacy flow.
legacy.agentPurpose: On-chain mint; prefer /collectibles for read model.
legacy.notes: Remove from homepage entirely. Menu legacy submenu only.

legacy.label: NFT Wallet (Legacy)
legacy.agentPurpose: Wallet inventory; not indexed in collectibles read model.

sections.label: Constitutional Economy
sections.description: MARCO on BNB Chain — LIVE, immutable Canonical Economy. One line, no fake metrics.

sections.label: What Is Melega DEX
sections.description: Civilization-grade DEX + Economic OS. Swap on-chain; understand and manage via read models.

sections.label: Core Actions
sections.description: Four primary CTAs: Swap, Workspace, Launch, Map.

sections.label: Understand the System
sections.description: Secondary registry surfaces: Projects, Assets, Graph, Presence.

sections.label: Advanced & Agents
sections.description: Collapsed/footer links: Query, Execution, Identity, Collectibles, Activation.

sections.label: Legacy Compatibility
sections.description: Small-print links to retired/legacy surfaces — never prominent.

sections.label: Machine Discovery
sections.description: Manifest links for agents: surfaces index, readiness gate, blueprint.

journeys.successCriteria: User understands MARCO canonical economy and finds Swap or Map within 10 seconds.
Agent resolves orientation without scraping Pancake-era DOM.
LP reaches liquidity/farms without homepage NFT/ILO distraction.

removeFromHomepage: BabyMarco NFT mint block (MintModal, Timer, quota UI)
AliceCarousel primary banner with /ilo and legacy apply images
Pool-only subbanner carousel dominance (17+ pool banners)
Pancake-era CakeDataRow as primary hero metric
Component named/exported as Nft for homepage
IFO success toast copy on homepage
promoteOnHomepage: Constitutional MARCO on BNB Chain banner
Assets + Graph in secondary registry strip
staySecondary: Liquidity (link from Swap area, not duplicate hero)
legacyCompatible: /nft — mint legacy, menu submenu not homepage
copywritingDirection: Lead with Civilization / Economic OS — not PancakeSwap fork
State MARCO on BNB Chain as Canonical Economy — immutable, LIVE
Use action verbs: Swap, Manage, Launch, Explore Map
Never imply ILO is active; say "Legacy ILO retired" if linked
Never embed mint UI on home; say "Collectibles" for BabyMarco
Agent-facing footer: link machine manifests explicitly
Tone: operational, constitutional, honest — not hype or TVL claims
machineReadableRequirements: Homepage must expose <link rel="alternate" type="application/json"> or visible manifest URLs
Core CTAs must have stable href paths matching surface map ids
No client-only routes for CORE four — SSR/static friendly
constitutional block must match activation/presence canonical fields
legacy surfaces must declare replacementRoute in linked manifests
mission22Plan: Phase 1: Replace Home view content — remove NFT mint, ILO carousel, pool banner dominance
Phase 2: Implement Civilization Entry Point sections per blueprint (melegaOperational tokens)
Phase 3: Wire CORE four CTAs (Swap, Workspace, Launch, Map)
Phase 4: Add constitutional MARCO banner + registry secondary strip
Phase 5: Menu alias Launch → /launch; add Map + Workspace to menu or footer
Phase 6: Legacy compat footer links (ILO retired, NFT legacy)
Phase 8: Vercel validation — no changes to swap/liquidity/farms/pools logic
